title: Memocracy
quote: Where creativity, humor, and digital expression come together.
story: Memocracy is a creative competition where students design and create memes based on given themes, showcasing humor, originality, and communication through digital content.
description: Memocracy is a meme-making competition that challenges participants to create engaging and creative memes around assigned themes or topics. The event encourages students to combine humor, creativity, and storytelling while expressing ideas through digital content creation in a fun and competitive environment.
